title: Pest Control in Melrose, Bronx | Extermination Services NYC
metaDescription: Professional pest control services in Melrose, Bronx. Expert extermination for cockroaches, bed bugs, mice, and rats in apartment buildings and rowhouses. Call today!
intro: Melrose's dense residential landscape of apartment buildings and classic rowhouses creates unique pest control challenges that require experienced professionals. Our team provides comprehensive extermination services tailored to the multi-family dwellings and connected housing structures that define this South Bronx neighborhood. We understand the urgency of pest problems in closely-packed residential areas and respond quickly to protect your home.
localContext: Melrose's tightly-packed apartment complexes and historic rowhouses along tree-lined streets create interconnected living spaces where pests can easily travel between units. The neighborhood's proximity to the Bronx River and busy commercial corridors like East 149th Street contributes to ongoing pest pressure in residential buildings.
commonPests: Multi-unit apartment buildings in Melrose commonly experience cockroach infestations, bed bugs, and rodent problems that can spread quickly through shared walls, plumbing, and ventilation systems. Older rowhouses with shared foundations and basement spaces are particularly vulnerable to mouse and rat activity, especially during colder months.

faqs.question: Why are cockroaches so common in Melrose apartment buildings?
faqs.answer: Cockroaches thrive in Melrose's multi-family buildings due to shared plumbing systems, wall voids, and the close proximity of units. They can easily migrate between apartments through cracks, pipes, and electrical conduits. Regular professional treatment of the entire building, not just individual units, is essential for effective cockroach control in dense residential areas.

faqs.question: How do bed bugs spread in Melrose rowhouses and apartments?
faqs.answer: Bed bugs spread through shared walls, visiting guests, secondhand furniture, and laundry facilities common in Melrose apartment buildings. In connected rowhouses, they can travel through adjoining walls and floors. Early detection and professional heat treatment or chemical applications are crucial to prevent building-wide infestations.

faqs.question: What attracts rodents to Melrose residential buildings?
faqs.answer: Rodents are attracted to Melrose buildings by accessible food sources, gaps in building foundations, unsealed entry points around pipes and utilities, and basement storage areas. The neighborhood's older building stock often has structural vulnerabilities that mice and rats exploit. Professional exclusion work combined with trapping and baiting programs provides the most effective long-term rodent control.
